Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON'
from PIL import Image
import colorsys

# 打开图片
img = Image.open\('/Users/xu/Documents/SRC_wechat/miniprogram/images/IMG_6754.jpg'\)
img = img.convert\('RGB'\)

# 调整大小以便处理
img = img.resize\(\(100, 50\)\)

# 获取主要颜色（粉红色）
colors = img.getcolors\(\)
# 按出现次数排序，排除白色背景
non_white_colors = [\(count, rgb\) for count, rgb in colors if sum\(rgb\) < 700]
non_white_colors.sort\(reverse=True\)

if non_white_colors:
    main_color = non_white_colors[0][1]
    hex_color = '#%02x%02x%02x' % main_color
    print\(f"主要颜色 \(RGB\): {main_color}"\)
    print\(f"主要颜色 \(Hex\): {hex_color}"\)
else:
    print\("未找到主要颜色，使用估算值：#E63B9F"\)
PYTHON)
